title: vitis calliobotrys
intro: Vitis calliobotrys, also known as the grape ivy, is a type of climbing vine in the Vitaceae family native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis calliobotrys include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
